summary: Backend testing for InterFitAI macro scaling logic and foods_to_avoid filtering. All 7 review request acceptance criteria PASSED. Template path (4-step ingredient-level scaling) and AI path (4-stage correction + Stage 4 last-meal balance) are working correctly. All diet types pass their specific criteria.

minor.issue: Keto plan total calories (2629-2669 kcal) significantly exceed user profile target (2273 kcal). This is expected behavior since keto uses diet-appropriate macro targets rather than user profile carb/fat targets, but may confuse users who expect their calorie target to be honored.

Vegan plan macros are identical to balanced plan (2288 cal, 172g P, 229g C, 76g F). All 3 days have exactly the same totals - this is correct for template path. However, a false positive 'animal product' detection was found: the word 'egg' appears as substring of 'veggie' (in 'Mediterranean Veggies'). This is not an actual animal product.

All 3 days of template-based plans (balanced, vegan, high_protein) return identical macro totals (2288 cal, 172g P, 229g C, 76g F) because the same template scaling is applied uniformly. While meals/ingredients differ, the macro totals are always the same. Not a bug but may feel repetitive.

keto.note: Correctly using keto-specific targets, NOT user profile 227g carbs

foods_to_avoid_chicken_template.chicken_violations: ZERO - in names, ingredients, and instructions

generated_meals: Grilled Sirloin Steak with Sweet Potato and Sautéed Spinach
Grilled Shrimp with Quinoa and Roasted Vegetables

action_items: INFO: Keto plan calories (2629-2669) exceed user profile target (2273). Consider whether keto should honor user calorie target or always use diet-appropriate macros. Current behavior passes the <50g carb requirement.
INFO: Template-based plans have identical macro totals across all 3 days (different meals but same macro numbers). Consider if this is acceptable or if variation is desired.
critical_code_review_comments: Template path scale_day_to_targets() 4-step ingredient scaling is working correctly (calorie → protein → carb → fat). Output macros are honest reflections of ingredient amounts.
AI path Stage 4 last-meal balance correctly guarantees EXACT daily totals for non-keto plans by forcing the last meal to absorb the remainder.
Template foods_to_avoid filter (lines 4032-4047): correctly renames meal if name contains banned food AND removes banned ingredients. Both checks working.
generate_alternate_meal() PROTEIN_GROUPS filtering + 3-attempt retry + post-validation all working. Alternate meal correctly excludes chicken.
Keto path correctly bypasses Stage 2/3/4 scaling and uses honest ingredient macros only - confirmed working.
Vegan 'egg' substring false positive: the word 'egg' appears in 'veggie' as a substring. Not a real bug but worth noting for vegan animal product validation.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing test user: cbd82a69-3a37-48c2-88e8-0fe95081fa4b
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 review request acceptance criteria PASS as of 2026-03-25. Template path delivers near-exact macros (0.7% cal, 1.2% P, 0.9% C, 0.0% F deviation). AI path Stage 4 guarantees exact totals for non-keto. Keto correctly uses <50g carbs. foods_to_avoid='chicken' filter works in both template generation and alternate meal generation. Note: template plans have identical macro totals across all 3 days (different meals, same numbers). Keto calories are higher than user profile target because keto ignores profile carb/fat targets in favor of diet-appropriate ratios.
